KAISER SHIFTED BURDEN, AND PLAINTIFF HAS NOT REBUTTED IT. DEPOSITION TESTIMONY PLUS FAILURE TO RESPOND TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES/NO EXPLANATION GIVEN FOR FAILURE TO RESPOND. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE DENIED. NO SPECIFIC SHOWING AS TO WHAT IS BEING SOUGHT, HOW IT MIGHT HELP, OR WHEN IT WILL BE OBTAINED. ALSO, A DISCRETIONARY CONTINUANCE IS NOT WARRANTED GIVEN PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO RESPOND TO KAISER'S DISCOVERY REQUESTS). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. REPORTER: PATRICIA M. EVEZICH, CSR #1193

MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Carmen Dutton Sandgren, Esq. 982-6300 for defts & moving parties Kaiser Cement Corporation and Kaiser Gypsum Company, Inc.; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling (MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. KAISER SHIFTED BURDEN, AND PLAINTIFF HAS NOT REBUTTED IT. DEPOSITION TESTIMONY PLUS FAILURE TO RESPOND TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES/NO EXPLANATION GIVEN FOR FAILURE TO RESPOND. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE DENIED. NO SPECIFIC SHOWING AS TO WHAT IS BEING SOUGHT, HOW IT MIGHT HELP, OR WHEN IT WILL BE OBTAINED. ALSO, A DISCRETIONARY CONTINUANCE IS NOT WARRANTED GIVEN PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO RESPOND TO KAISER'S DISCOVERY REQUESTS). Order signed in open court. (AJR/JH)
